name: Cool 'n Easy Strawberry-Kiwi Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir boiling water into JELL-O in a large bowl for 2 minutes or until dissolved.
2. Mix cold water and ice to make 1 ¼ cups.
3. Gradually add the mixture to the gelatin, stirring until slightly thickened (consistency of unbeaten egg whites).
4. Remove any remaining ice.
5. Stir in tub COOL WHIP with a wire whisk until smooth.
6. Refrigerate for 10 to 15 minutes or until the mixture is very thick and will mound.
7. Spoon into crust.
8. Refrigerate for 4 hours or until firm.
9. Garnish with a dollop of COOL WHIP, surrounded by 3 kiwi slices, and whole strawberry, sliced and fanned out, just before serving.
